outcome_record.event_name: FIFA World Cup 2026 Final — France vs Brazil (MetLife Stadium)

prediction.pre_match_note: WORLD CUP 2026 FINAL. Importance score 1.00. Mbappé (France, Real Madrid) ATM 0.40 applied. Vinicius Jr (Brazil, Real Madrid) ATM 0.35 applied. NCSI for $RMFC: maximum dual-nation signal. France vs Brazil = two highest-ATM nations. CDI projection: winner = 112.5+ days.

calibration_flags.notes: WORLD CUP 2026 FINAL — LANDMARK CALIBRATION RECORD. France wins. $RMFC +19.4% (Mbappé's tournament + Vinicius Jr in losing team — net positive for Real Madrid). Dual-nation NCSI model validated at maximum competition level. CDI France WC winner: 112.5 days projected. This is the most commercially significant single football match in the calibration library.
